arts.ttl: Hansi Flick again confirms Barcelona’s no.1 goalkeeper
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has on Wednesday moved to reiterate that a first-choice goalkeeper has been established in his squad. The player in question? Wojciech Szczęsny. Shot-stopper Szczęsny has…

arts.ttl: Blow for Valencia as two stars set to miss Copa de Rey clash against Barcelona through injury
arts.sum: Valencia are set to host Barcelona at the Mestalla tomorrow evening in the quarter-final of the Copa del Rey. It’s not long since Valencia last faced the Catalan side, when…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star sends message to Nico over Man City switch
arts.sum: Barcelona star Gavi has taken to social media, to send a message of encouragement to former teammate Nico González. The name of midfielder Nico has of course dominated the headlines…

arts.ttl: Barcelona considering transfer swoop for 27-year-old Crystal Palace star
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly considering a surprise transfer move for Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta for this summer. The Frenchman has been in fine form for the Eagles in the last year or so, though he’s not necessarily someone you’d expect to be seeing linked with the very biggest names in European club football. arts.ttl: 'Unstoppable' £48m winger who Mikel Arteta 'would love to sign' says he's better than Lamine Yamal
Barcelona star training away from teammates ahead of Valencia clash
arts.sum: Barcelona star Gavi was put through his paces in training away from the rest of the club’s squad on Wednesday. This comes amid ongoing caution when it comes to the…

arts.ttl: Flick confirms Gavi out, Dani Olmo ‘an option’ against Valencia
arts.sum: Tuesday brought some good news as Dani Olmo return to training after missing two weeks with a calf issue, and the attacking midfielder’s return comes at a perfect time thanks to the head injury sustained by Gavi during last weekend’s clash with Alavés. Hansi Flick confirmed in a press conference on Wednesday that Gavi is in concussion protocol and will not be available for the trip, but that Olmo is indeed back and is expected to play some minutes in the second half.

There was great news at Tuesday's Barça training session ahead of the cup game at Mestalla on Thursday at 9.30pm CET. Araujo, although he did not want to reveal his new release clause, insisted on his desire to continue as a Barça player and pointed out that "we all did a great job and now I feel valued, that's the important thing.

arts.ttl: Barcelona named amongst three giants following right-back
arts.sum: Barcelona are keen to give Hansi Flick more depth at the full-back positions next season, with the right-back spot in particular a priority for Sporting Director Deco. With several major contract renewals done, and the January transfer window shut, the Blaugrana are now looking at their options for the summer. arts.ttl: ‘No room for error’ - Araujo sends Barca title warning
arts.sum: Barcelona defender Ronald Araujo has warned his team there’s “no room for error” in the title race after cutting the gap to Real Madrid. Barca have already lost five times this season in the Spanish top flight, and Araujo knows his team can’t afford any more slip-ups.
